channel.title: Authors on QUKO | Data solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on QUKO | Data solutions

item.title: Pablo (Pepe) Álvarez
item.description: Telecommunication Engineer (2021) by the Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, specialised in telecommunication systems and signal processing. Quantum Engineer by ETH Zürich (2024) and currently enroled in a PhD programme in Quantum Information Theory by the Université Grenoble Alpes. Former experimental physicist and data analyst in CERN (EP-DT group). Higl-Level Athlete in Sprint Canoeing, actively competing at the highest national level.
